commands.review_summary:
The PR extends Slack native approvals to plugin approval events, routes plugin approval DMs through Slack plugin approvers, makes fallback suppression kind-aware, updates docs, and adds focused Slack approval tests.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main subscribes Slack native approval delivery only to exec events while fallback suppression is based on Slack native enablement rather than plugin deliverability. I did not run a live Slack workspace reproduction.
commands.review_followup: This PR needs maintainer handling and real Slack behavior proof; there is no narrow code repair for ClawSweeper to apply from this review.

target.title: fix(slack): deliver native plugin approvals
target.body:
## Summary

- deliver Slack native plugin approval events through the existing native approval runtime and Block Kit approval UI
- route Slack plugin approval DMs to plugin approvers from `allowFrom` / account defaults while keeping exec approval DMs on exec approvers
- align Slack plugin fallback suppression with kind-aware native deliverability, and document the Slack native approval behavior

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/slack/src/approval-native.test.ts extensions/slack/src/approval-handler.runtime.test.ts extensions/slack/src/monitor/events/interactions.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p extensions/slack/tsconfig.json --noEmit`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm docs:check-mdx`
- `pnpm docs:check-i18n-glossary`
- `pnpm lint:extensions:no-src-outside-plugin-sdk && pnpm lint:extensions:no-relative-outside-package`
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions` was run and is blocked by existing unrelated `extensions/openai-apps` missing dependencies/types for `codex-app-server-sdk` and `@mariozechner/pi-ai/oauth`; no Slack production type errors were reported.
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions:test` was run after fixing Slack test types and is blocked by the same unrelated `extensions/openai-apps` missing dependencies/types; no Slack test type errors were reported.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Slack native approval delivery now handles plugin approval request, resolved, and expired events instead of suppressing shared plugin fallback while subscribing only to exec events.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw source checkout on branch `codex/slack-native-plugin-approval-events`; no live Slack workspace credentials were used.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/slack/src/approval-native.test.ts extensions/slack/src/approval-handler.runtime.test.ts extensions/slack/src/monitor/events/interactions.test.ts`.

Evidence after fix: The focused Slack tests pass with 68 tests, including plugin-native event subscription, plugin-only approver native delivery, plugin DM target resolution, plugin rendering, fallback suppression safety, and existing Slack plugin button resolution authorization.

Observed result after fix: Slack native plugin approvals render and update through the native runtime when Slack has plugin approvers; exec-only approvers are not treated as plugin approvers, and plugin fallback remains available when Slack cannot deliver the plugin request natively.

What was not tested: Live Slack API delivery and interaction clicks against a real Slack app were not run in this environment.
target.author: kevinslin
